risks.title: Event deduplication system failure
risks.evidence: 4 events for identical file (Security.tsx) with timestamps within 17ms; events explicitly tagged as duplicates
risks.recommendedAction: Investigate code-observer event pipeline to prevent duplicate events from reaching downstream systems

risks.title: Security file changes lack validation
risks.evidence: Security.tsx modified but no security testing or review automation detected in event stream
risks.recommendedAction: Implement automated security scanning and code review requirements for security-sensitive files

opportunities.title: Improve event deduplication
opportunities.evidence: Clear duplicate pattern (same file, timestamps <20ms apart) suggests fixable issue in observation pipeline
opportunities.suggestedAction: Add deduplication logic at event source or aggregation layer to reduce noise

opportunities.title: Establish security file safeguards
opportunities.evidence: Security.tsx changes detected; no automated guardrails preventing unsafe modifications
opportunities.suggestedAction: Add security review requirements and automated scanning for files in security-related directories

taskCandidates.title: Review Security.tsx recent changes
taskCandidates.description: Examine modifications to /home/riad/github/kairos/src/screens/Security.tsx for security implications and best practices
taskCandidates.rationale: Security file changes require verification; high-relevance events (0.95, 0.85) indicate actual modifications

taskCandidates.title: Fix event deduplication in code-observer
taskCandidates.description: Investigate and eliminate duplicate events from code-observer system; implement deduplication before downstream processing
taskCandidates.rationale: Duplicate events create noise and potential for missed alerts; 4 events for single file change wastes resources

recommendations.title: Implement event deduplication
recommendations.rationale: The 4 near-identical events indicate a systemic issue in the observation pipeline that should be fixed at the source
recommendations.action: Add timestamp-based deduplication and content hashing to code-observer to prevent duplicate event generation

recommendations.title: Add security file protections
recommendations.rationale: Security module changes should be gated by automated scanning and human review to prevent vulnerabilities
recommendations.action: Configure code review requirements and security scanning for files in src/screens/*Security* and src/*auth* patterns

pendingApprovals.reason: Sensitive proactive task requires approval: Review Security.tsx recent changes
